film.title: Picnic
film.overview: Labor Day in a small Kansas farm town. Hal, a burly and resolute drifter, jumps off a dusty freight train car with the purpose of visiting Alan, a former college classmate and son of the richest man in town.

dialogues.dialogue: Just for me.  If I have one, will you stop coaxing?  Just the same, you ought to be ashamed of yourself.  Oh, kids! That looks like a lovely spot.  Yes! That's just fine.

After I left Hollywood... ...l took a job on a ranch in Nevada.  ...l took a job on a ranch in Nevada.  You'd have been proud of me.  ln bed every night at 1 0... ...up every morning at 6.  ...up every morning at 6.
dialogues.cause_raw: working on a ranch and maintaining a disciplined schedule

Speech!  Thank you.  I'm very proud... ...and I'll try hard to be a good Queen.  ...and I'll try hard to be a good Queen.  And I'll try hardest of all not to get conceited.
